message: Restore Alloc Stress benchmark section and daemon mode

files.patch:
@@ -104,6 +104,16 @@ Benchmarks run on WAMR (WebAssembly Micro Runtime) with **AOT compilation** for
 | `Node.js (CLI)` | 35.7 ± 0.8 | 34.5 | 37.2 | 5.42 |
 | `Porffor (WASM)` | 102.1 ± 3.2 | 98.6 | 111.2 | 15.51 |
 
+### Alloc Stress (30k allocations)
+
+| Command | Mean [ms] | Min [ms] | Max [ms] | Relative |
+|:---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
+| `Bun (CLI)` | 21.5 ± 0.8 | 20.5 | 23.0 | 1.00 |
+| `EdgeBox (AOT)` | 25.5 ± 0.9 | 24.0 | 26.5 | 1.19 |
+| `Node.js (CLI)` | 40.5 ± 1.9 | 38.1 | 44.0 | 1.88 |
+| `Porffor (CLI)` | 49.8 ± 1.1 | 48.6 | 51.8 | 2.32 |
+| `Porffor (WASM)` | 284.2 ± 7.2 | 275.7 | 300.3 | 13.22 |
+
 ### CPU fib(35)
 
 | Command | Mean [ms] | Min [ms] | Max [ms] | Relative |

@@ -120,9 +120,9 @@ run_benchmark() {
     local js_file=$5
     local output_file=$6
 
-    # Daemon is disabled until WAMR migration is complete
-    # start_daemon "$edgebox_file"
-    local daemon_available=1  # 1 = not available
+    # Start daemon for this benchmark
+    start_daemon "$edgebox_file"
+    local daemon_available=$?
 
     local porffor_native="$SCRIPT_DIR/${name}_porffor"
 
@@ -141,8 +141,8 @@ run_benchmark() {
 
     eval $cmd || echo "WARNING: hyperfine failed for $name benchmark"
 
-    # Daemon disabled during WAMR migration
-    # stop_daemon
+    # Stop daemon after benchmark
+    stop_daemon
 }
 
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
